title: Products

media.title: Images and Media
media.clickOrDragImages: Click or drag to add images

hints.priceUpdatedAt: Date when current price was changed
hints.previousPriceUpdatedAt: Date when previous price was changed
hints.group: Main group the product belongs to
hints.subcategory: Detailed category (Forest Fruit, Leafy Vegetable, etc.)

categories.subtitle: Manage product categories

productionTypes.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the production type "{name}"?

uploadZone.title: Drag and drop image here or click

videoUploadZone.title: Drag and drop videos here or click

assignLabel.noDevices: No assignable ESL device found for {scope}

assignLabel.newAssignmentHint: Use the fields below to add a new assignment or change existing assignment.

toast.loadFailed: Failed to load label assignment modal

removeConfirm.title: Remove Label Assignment
removeConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to remove this label assignment?

conflict.title: Device Already Assigned
conflict.message: The selected device is already assigned to another product.
conflict.hint: If you continue, this device will be removed from the old product and assigned to the new product.

help.title: Print Settings
help.warning: Select paper size as "{size}" or "Custom" in printer settings.
help.tip: Tip: You can predefine this size in your label printer.

toast.loadError: An error occurred while loading products

sendToDevice.title: Send to Device
sendToDevice.noDevicesCompany: No online devices found for company "{companyName}"
sendToDevice.noDevicesBranch: No online devices found for branch "{branchName}"
sendToDevice.noDevicesRegion: No online devices found for region "{regionName}"
sendToDevice.noIpAddress: Selected device IP address is not defined
sendToDevice.loadFailed: Failed to load device and template information
sendToDevice.templateOrDeviceFailed: Failed to get template or device information
sendToDevice.saveAssignmentHelp: Will be default in next sends
sendToDevice.noAssignments: None of the selected products have device assignments. First assign products to devices.
sendToDevice.selectDeviceTypeHelp: Products assigned to the selected device type will be sent to their assigned devices.
sendToDevice.noProductsForType: No products assigned to this device type found
sendToDevice.cacheNotReady: Some images are not yet rendered
sendToDevice.waitForRenderDesc: Wait until all images are rendered
sendToDevice.sendReadyOnlyDesc: Send only products ready in cache
sendToDevice.renderNowDesc: Render missing images and send all
sendToDevice.timeout: Operation timed out. Please try again.

validation.kunyeNumeric: Registration number must contain only digits

name.minLength: Product name must be at least 2 characters
name.maxLength: Product name can be at most 255 characters

sku.minLength: Stock code must be at least 1 character
sku.maxLength: Stock code can be at most 100 characters
sku.pattern: Stock code can only contain letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores

currentPrice.type: Price must be a valid number

previousPrice.min: Previous price cannot be less than 0
previousPrice.type: Previous price must be a valid number

barcode.maxLength: Barcode can be at most 50 characters
barcode.pattern: Barcode can only contain letters, numbers and hyphens

kunyeNo.pattern: Registration number can only contain digits

vatRate.min: VAT rate cannot be less than 0
vatRate.max: VAT rate cannot be greater than 100
vatRate.type: VAT rate must be a valid number

discountPercent.min: Discount rate cannot be less than 0
discountPercent.max: Discount rate cannot be greater than 100
discountPercent.type: Discount rate must be a valid number

stock.type: Stock must be a valid integer

weight.type: Weight must be a valid number

slug.maxLength: URL slug can be at most 255 characters
slug.pattern: URL slug can only contain lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens

hal.queryHint: You can load information by querying with registration number

captchaWarning.message: HAL system currently requires CAPTCHA (robot verification). Automatic query cannot be performed.
captchaWarning.manualQueryDesc: You can query manually from HAL website.
captchaWarning.apiIntegrationDesc: You can query via SOAP API by entering your HAL credentials.

productionType.orSelectExisting: or select an existing production type

bulkPrint.info: {count} products selected. A separate label page will be created for each product.
bulkPrint.templateHint: If no template is selected, simple label format will be used
bulkPrint.paperSizeHint: If selected, labels will be arranged in grid layout on paper

bulkPrint.gridInfo: {cols}x{rows} = {labelsPerPage} labels per page, total {totalLabels} labels, {pages} pages
bulkPrint.labelTooLarge: Label size does not fit selected paper

previewHelp.title: Print Information
previewHelp.warning: Make sure your printer supports {width}x{height}mm size.
previewHelp.tip: Set scaling to "Actual size" or "100%" in print dialog.

bulkPrint.popupBlocked: Popup window blocked. Please allow popups from browser settings.
